fault_hypothesis: The condition for clamping the result is inverted. The code on line 66 checks `if not clamp:` instead of `if clamp:`, causing clamping to be applied when disabled and skipped when enabled.

spec.expr: y__1 >= min(y0, y1) and y__1 <= max(y0, y1)

constraints.intent: The program is only correct for interpolation cases because the buggy clamping logic is not triggered.
The clamping logic block should only be entered when clamping is enabled.
The non-clamping path should only be taken when clamping is disabled.
